description: Authoritative sources for TKE Knowledge Base L1 (Clinical Core)

sources.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of CKD
sources.notes: Core guideline — covers CKD staging, RAAS blockade, SGLT2i, finerenone, lifestyle

sources.title: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for Anemia in CKD
sources.notes: Anemia targets, ESA use, iron management. Supplement with 2024 executive summary

sources.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline Update for CKD-MBD
sources.notes: Phosphorus, calcium, PTH, vitamin D targets and management

sources.title: KDIGO 2021 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Management of Glomerular Diseases
sources.notes: IgAN, membranous, lupus nephritis, ANCA vasculitis, FSGS

sources.title: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in CKD
sources.notes: A1c targets in CKD, SGLT2i/GLP-1 RA recommendations, metformin thresholds

sources.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for Lipid Management in CKD
sources.notes: Statin use in CKD, PCSK9 inhibitors, LDL targets

sources.title: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for the Care of Kidney Transplant Recipients
sources.notes: Transplant immunosuppression, monitoring, complications. Needs update supplementation

sources.title: ADA Standards of Care in Diabetes 2024
2022 AHA/ACC/HFSA Guideline for the Management of Heart Failure
sources.notes: Four pillars of GDMT, HFrEF/HFpEF management, SGLT2i in HF

sources.title: 2020 American College of Rheumatology Guideline for Management of Gout
sources.notes: ULT indications, allopurinol/febuxostat dosing, flare management in CKD

sources.title: Dapagliflozin in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease (DAPA-CKD)
sources.notes: Landmark trial: dapagliflozin reduced composite kidney endpoint by 39%

sources.title: Empagliflozin in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease (EMPA-KIDNEY)
sources.notes: Empagliflozin in broader CKD population, including non-diabetic

sources.title: Finerenone in Patients with Diabetic Kidney Disease (FIDELIO-DKD)
sources.notes: Finerenone reduced kidney composite endpoint in T2D with CKD

sources.title: Semaglutide and Kidney Outcomes in Type 2 Diabetes (FLOW)
sources.notes: First GLP-1 RA to show primary kidney endpoint benefit in CKD

sources.title: Rituximab or Cyclosporine in Membranous Nephropathy (MENTOR)
sources.notes: Rituximab non-inferior to cyclosporine for membranous nephropathy remission
